title: Bedroom Parameter Manifest
description: Parametric controls for COGS 160 VR Bedroom pipeline.

ceiling_height_m.description: Vertical distance from floor to ceiling.
ceiling_height_m.rationale: Ceiling height primes different levels of mental abstraction.

wall_thickness_m.rationale: Perception of massiveness impacts enclosure and approach-avoidance decisions.

daylight_intensity.description: Intensity of the external sun/sky lighting.
daylight_intensity.rationale: Daylight intensity affects physiological arousal and circadian alignment.

sun_elevation_deg.description: Elevation angle of the sun. Lower = sunset/sunrise, higher = midday.
sun_elevation_deg.rationale: Time of day cues alter cognitive fatigue and soft fascination.

dust_density.description: Atmospheric dust density affecting haze and light scattering.
dust_density.rationale: Atmospheric haze modulates perception of depth and environmental cleanliness.

camera_exposure.description: Baseline camera exposure compensation for the scene.
camera_exposure.rationale: Visual clarity and brightness impact baseline wellness perceptions.

lighting_warmth.rationale: Spectral composition affects melatonin and circadian health.
